Event: Titanic Excavation
Event Date: 16/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI332
Crimson Covenant Ring

Once in a while, the unit becomes immune to freezing for 5 sec. Every second for that duration, the unit launches ice balls at 2 random enemy units, dealing 650000 pure damage on impact. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. Ice balls also reduce all of the target's stats by 20% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 4 times. Ice balls have a 50% chance to freeze their targets for 2 sec. as well. The targets are unable to move or attack for the duration, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
